changes: Rebuilt public/references/concordance.json from displayed KJV token text, including divineName capitalization and apostrophe normalization.
Rebuilt concordance compact/nested runtime variants from the new primary concordance.
Confirmed text-vs-concordance alignment is now exact at the displayed surface-word level.

Added text-surface AI Dictionary primary entries exposed by the new concordance, including Alpheus, Arimathea, Bartimeus, Cesar, Cesar's, Cesarea, Eneas, Epenetus, Esarhaddon, Galilean, Galileans, Hymeneus, Iturea, Lebbeus, Maran-atha, Pretorium, Thaddeus, Timeus, Zaccheus, and instructors.
Added canonical divine-name AI Dictionary entries for GOD, LORD, JEHOVAH, and LORD's, and updated resolver precedence so proper-case divine-name clicks resolve to those entries.
